build.details: Build completed successfully with only pre-existing webpack size warnings (not related to recent changes)

issues.fix: Remove unused import or use it in the component
Remove unused import or use it in the component

issues.description: BaseControl used without id property when label is present
issues.fix: Add id property to BaseControl component

lint.notes: Other lint errors exist in other blocks but are pre-existing and not related to this block's recent changes

registration.details: block.json is valid with apiVersion 3, all required attributes defined, and proper file references

attributes.details: All attributes defined in block.json match requirements. Test page contains 10 block instances with various attribute configurations

edgeCases.details: Test page includes edge cases: empty state (section 5 - Featured Posts with 0 results), very long heading (section 8), minimal carousel without navigation/pagination (section 9), and hideIfEmpty test (section 7)

testsRun.details: Next button successfully advances carousel to slide 2
Next button successfully advances carousel to slide 3

ariaChecks: Missing role="region" or role="group" on carousel container - FAIL
Missing aria-roledescription="carousel" on carousel container - FAIL
Missing role="group" and aria-roledescription="slide" on slide elements - FAIL
Section has aria-labelledby (when heading present) or aria-label (when no heading) - PASS
keyboardChecks: Navigation buttons are native button elements - PASS
Tab navigation through carousel elements works - assumed PASS (native buttons)
patternCompliance.details: The block uses a section element but does not apply the required carousel ARIA roles. The swiper container needs role="region" and aria-roledescription="carousel". Each .swiper-slide needs role="group" and aria-roledescription="slide". The section element currently has aria-labelledby which is correct, but the inner swiper container needs the carousel-specific roles.

semanticHtml.details: Proper heading hierarchy (h2 headings), semantic section elements, native button elements for navigation

keyboardNavigation.details: All interactive elements (navigation buttons) are native button elements with proper aria-label attributes

images.details: Images are rendered by card templates (card-post, card-team-member). Page audit shows 28 images across sections. All have src attributes. Alt text verification delegated to card template implementation.

contrastAudit.details: The block renders on a dark background (bg-charcoal via before:bg-charcoal). Navigation buttons use .carousel-nav-btn which inherits from Archive block CSS. Need to verify carousel-nav-btn has proper dark mode text/border colors for the charcoal background context.

markupDuplication.details: No responsive duplication patterns detected. Block uses single render path via FilteredServerSideRender in TSX and PHP template outputs carousel once.

tsxPhpSync.details: TSX file uses FilteredServerSideRender for carousel section, so PHP template is source of truth for rendered output. No TSX/PHP sync issues since TSX doesn't duplicate the carousel markup. Recent changes were CSS-only (swiper.css and PHP class change on line 150).

innerBlocks.reason: Block does not use inner blocks

specCompliance.details: Changes were CSS-only per planning spec. (1) Removed self-start from swiper-slide class on line 150 to enable equal-height cards via Swiper's default stretch behavior. (2) Added image hover zoom CSS in swiper.css scoped to .dynamic-content-carousel .card-post img and .card-team-member img with scale(1.05) and 0.3s ease transition. Both changes implemented exactly as specified.

issues.description: Carousel container missing required ARIA roles. The swiper container needs role="region" and aria-roledescription="carousel" per the Carousel accessibility pattern.
issues.fix: Add role="region" and aria-roledescription="carousel" to the .swiper div element

issues.description: Slide elements missing required ARIA roles. Each .swiper-slide needs role="group" and aria-roledescription="slide" per the Carousel accessibility pattern.
issues.fix: Add role="group" aria-roledescription="slide" to each .swiper-slide div element

issues.description: Carousel navigation buttons may have insufficient contrast against charcoal background. The .carousel-nav-btn class is shared with Archive block. Need to verify it has proper dark mode text/border color overrides for rendering in the charcoal background context.
issues.fix: Verify .carousel-nav-btn has appropriate dark:text-* and dark:border-* variants. If missing, add context-conditional color classes or ensure carousel-nav-btn CSS has proper contrast on dark backgrounds.

issues.description: BaseControl component used without id property when label is present
issues.fix: Add id property to the BaseControl component at line 198
Remove unused import statement or use the component in the TSX
Remove unused import statement or use the component in the TSX
